name: writing
description: Writer skills for technical docs, blog articles (general and AI-narrated), dev artifacts (commit messages, PR/issue descriptions, review comments), changelogs, meeting notes, and translations — each with a built-in check against generic, hedge-heavy AI-generated-prose patterns. Also includes a PreToolUse hook that nudges before writing *.md, a mechanical fixed-phrase hook for known Japanese AI-tell phrases, and an occasional project-wide audit skill for the semantic issues the dictionary can't catch (absence of a writer's stance, structural monotony, formulaic paraphrases).
